name: story-composer-01
title: Story Composer 01
author: ilinxa
description: Instagram-canonical story creation surface — camera-first capture, multi-layer Konva editor, 6 edit tools, pan + pinch-zoom, video record + trim + overlay bake, publish via XHR + uploader escape hatch, undo/redo, permission-denied auto-retry, discard-confirm guard. As of the media-editor-01 extraction (C3–C5), the capture + canvas + edit-tool surface is delegated to @ilinxa/media-editor-01 via backward-compat re-exports; story-composer-01 ships only the story-shaped wrapper (publish bar, publish progress, shell, story state) at this version. The Phase B wrapper refactor (C16+) finalizes story-composer-01 v0.2.0 on top of media-editor-01.
